trades.reasoning: ETSY has dropped off the screener entirely, signaling lost momentum; rotating proceeds into top-ranked names with confirmed technical strength
Top-ranked (score 100) with a volume surge on top of all bullish MACD/RSI/SMA signals — the strongest setup in today's screener in a risk-on market
Score 95 with MACD crossover and price above SMA-20; Palantir's AI/data analytics platform attracts institutional flow in risk-on conditions

decisions.briefing: Markets are firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ +0.9% and S&P 500 +0.6%, ideal conditions for momentum names. ETSY has disappeared from the screener, so I'm rotating those proceeds into XNDU — today's highest-ranked name with a confirmed volume surge — and PLTR, a high-conviction AI data play with clean technicals. After these trades we'll hold 7 positions with 3 open slots ready for the next strong setup.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities posted broad gains today as risk appetite returned on easing trade-war anxiety and better-than-feared corporate earnings from major tech companies. The NASDAQ led at +0.9% as AI-infrastructure and semiconductor names drew heavy buying interest. Defensive sectors lagged — a textbook risk-on rotation that typically follows a period of elevated macro uncertainty.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市今日全面上漲，投資者風險偏好回升，主因貿易戰緊張情緒緩和，加上大型科技企業業績優於市場預期。NASDAQ以+0.9%領漲，人工智能基礎設施及半導體類股獲資金大舉流入。防禦性板塊表現落後，呈現典型風險偏好輪動格局，此現象通常出現於宏觀不確定性高峰過後的修復期。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Sector rotation is when investors shift money out of one part of the market into another as conditions change — for example, selling slow-growing consumer stocks like ETSY and buying high-momentum tech names when confidence returns. On a risk-on day like today, capital flows toward growth and technology sectors. Today's portfolio move (selling ETSY, buying XNDU and PLTR) is sector rotation at the individual stock level.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 板塊輪動是指投資者隨著市場環境變化，將資金從一個領域轉移至另一個領域——例如在信心回升時，賣出ETSY等增長趨緩的消費股，轉而買入高動能科技股。在今日這樣的風險偏好升溫行情中，資金往往流向成長型及科技板塊。今日的操作（賣出ETSY、買入XNDU及PLTR）正是個股層面的板塊輪動實踐。
